title: TEST
summary: A 1-sentence summary of what this project accomplished.
impact: Replaced an old Excel system saving 40 hours per week.

title: Federon Procurement Solutions
summary: Built operational tools, apps, and automations to optimize complex procurement and internal workflows.
longDescription:
At Federon, I was responsible for overhauling the procurement and contract management workflows using the Microsoft Power Platform.

The legacy system relied heavily on manual data entry across disconnected spreadsheets and email threads, which led to frequent errors and slow turnaround times.

By architecting a solution with Power Apps as the front-end interface and Dataverse as the robust back-end, we centralized all request data. I implemented complex Power Automate flows to handle role-based approvals, dynamic email notifications, and SLA tracking.

The final solution not only improved data transparency across the organization but directly optimized the daily operational workflows, drastically reducing administrative overhead.

title: Interactive Analytics Dashboard (100% Local Demo)
summary: This is a fully-populated local demo project. Open the modal to see the gallery and embed video!
longDescription:
Welcome to the fully-populated demo case study!

This project demonstrates how a completed setup appears on your local server. It uses 100% local images downloaded natively into the `/portfolio/projects/0-demo-case-study/` folder, proving that no external hosting is required for images to work perfectly.

Notice that the gallery images in this modal loaded in their exact alphabetical order, exactly as intended.
impact: Loaded local photos natively using the updated generator logic.
Proved that images are automatically sorted alphabetically (1_dashboard, 2_reports, 3_mobile).
